creator: eserte@cs.tu-berlin.de
text:
Tk 800.018 is fairly stable (although labelled beta). You can
	trust me, I'm a heavy perl/Tk tester :-)

Fix: The patch is rather large, because I'm using a script which
	automates the creation of MAN1, MAN3 and the PLIST by examing
	perl's own packlist. The PLIST is alphabetised, hence the
	extra differences.
